content.json:
## Monitoring & Observability Capstone

Replace <WORKSPACE_RESOURCE_ID> below with your actual workspace Resource ID.

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
    (StorageBlobLogs | where TimeGenerated > ago(24h) | where StatusText != "Success" | project TimeGenerated, Source="StorageBlobLogs", Detail=StatusText, ResourceId=AccountName),
    (ADFPipelineRun | where TimeGenerated > ago(24h) | where Status == "Failed" | project TimeGenerated, Source="ADFPipelineRun", Detail=Status, ResourceId=PipelineName)
| order by TimeGenerated desc

ADFPipelineRun
| where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
| summarize TotalRuns=count(), Failed=countif(Status=="Failed"), Succeeded=countif(Status=="Succeeded") by PipelineName
| extend SuccessRate = round(100.0 * Succeeded / TotalRuns, 1)

AZKeyVaultAuditEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
| where OperationName in ("SecretGet", "SecretSet", "SecretList")
| summarize AccessCount=count() by OperationName, bin(TimeGenerated, 1d)
| order by TimeGenerated desc
